claims.summary: A shared correspondence log must preserve state across cycles rather than act as a flat mailbox.
claims.disposition: verify persisted thread state, message lineage, and latest receipt projections

claims.summary: The next response should anchor to a specific prior reflection.
claims.disposition: verify reply_to, reply_link, thread_id, and parent-message references

claims.summary: Time to reciprocity requires an explicit peer acknowledgment rather than a read receipt.
claims.disposition: verify read_receipt_not_acknowledgement and observe zero ACK receipts

claims.summary: Astrid-Minime room correlation is contextual evidence, not proof of correspondence.
claims.disposition: verify contact eligibility excludes correlation-only inference

claims.summary: A peer retains the right not to acknowledge or reply.
claims.disposition: preserve no_response as absence and never auto-escalate silence into attention or control
